title: Vivi Explains the War Ahead — Part 6
description: On pages 18–20, this part focuses on vivi explains the war ahead — part 6, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Vivi Explains the War Ahead — Part 6. The crew moves across Alabasta as Vivi explains the rebellion, Crocodile’s manipulation, and the need to stop the civil war. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Huh? Did he slip through the walls?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Or did he somehow smash the walls?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: So you have a death wish, do you now...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Don't try to stop me, Ms. Double-Finger.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It's 8 o'clock now and all the officer agents are here.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: And as instructed by the letter mailed to Spider's Cafe...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: We'll be heading to Rainbase, the city of dreams.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Paula (A.K.A. Baroque Works Officer Agent Miss Double-Finger)

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: That's where the mysterious man we call boss awaits us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: AWAWAWAWA! Dance, dance, dance, Usopp Gallery Pirates!
